title: Ron's Forever World
description: A mix of performance, world generation, UI, and quality-of-life mods to make vanilla smoother and more enjoyable.
body:
# Ron's Forever World
Ron's Forever World is a Vanilla+ modpack for 1.21.11 made for a private friend group survival server. It started as [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) and grew from there — more biomes, better UI, and a handful of quality-of-life additions that make day-to-day survival less annoying. You may pick between the NeoForge and Fabric version!

## ✨ Features

### 🚀 Performance
Sodium, Lithium, and Iris Shaders handle the heavy lifting. Distant Horizons extends your render distance without killing your framerate.

### 🗺️ World Generation
Terralith and Tectonic overhaul the overworld, Nullscape fills out the End, and Incendium makes the Nether worth visiting. The Ender Dragon also gets a proper fight with True Ending.

### 🖥️ HUD & UI
JEI, JourneyMap, Jade, and AppleSkin cover the essentials. BetterF3 and Better Statistics Screen fill in the rest.

### 🔧 Quality of Life
Inventory Profiles Next and Mouse Tweaks for inventory, FallingTree and RightClickHarvest for gathering, and Simple Voice Chat for in-game communication. Lootr gives everyone their own loot in chests, and Gravestones keeps your items safe on death.

## 🎮 Who Is This For?
There's also Controllify, which adds controller support if you'd like to enjoy on the couch.

## 📋 Credits
Based on [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) — Copyright 2020-2026 Fabulously Optimized Authors, used under the BSD 3-Clause License
